ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "inpatient_days" INTEGER /* Number of inpatient days the patient has had */,
  "er_visits" INTEGER /* Number of emergency room visits */,
  "office_visits" INTEGER /* Number of office visits */,
  "narcotics_usage" INTEGER /* Number indicating whether the patient uses narcotics */,
  "days_since_last_er_visit" INTEGER /* Number of days since the last ER visit */,
  "pain_level" INTEGER /* Pain level of the patient */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to healthcare providers */,
  "provider_count" INTEGER /* Number of different providers the patient has seen */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider for the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_pain" (
  "pain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pain record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "pain_level" INTEGER /* Level of pain experienced by the patient */,
  "pain_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the pain started */,
  "pain_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the pain ended */,
  "pain_description" TEXT /* Description of the pain */,
  "pain_trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for the pain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_pain_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., inpatient, ER, office) */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare provider */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  "visit_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provider */,
  "provider_address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narcotics" (
  "narcotics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each narcotics record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the narcotic drug */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the drug usage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the drug usage */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the drug */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the drug intake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("narcotics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_narcotics_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical claim */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_claims_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_lines" (
  "claim_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim line item */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medical claim */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was provided */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the service */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Code for the service (e.g., CPT, ICD-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_lines_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES medical_claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combination_therapy" (
  "therapy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapy record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "therapy_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the therapy started */,
  "therapy_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the therapy ended */,
  "therapy_success" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the therapy was successful */,
  "therapy_description" TEXT /* Description of the therapy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("therapy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combination_therapy_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acute_drug_gap" (
  "gap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug gap record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the gap */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the gap */,
  "gap_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the gap in days */,
  "gap_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the gap (e.g., missed dose, skipped prescription) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acute_drug_gap_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_care" (
  "care_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each care record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "care_quality" TEXT /* Quality of care received */,
  "care_date" TEXT /* Date when the care was provided */,
  "care_provider" TEXT /* Name of the care provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("care_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_care_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., pediatrics, oncology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the access (e.g., treatment, billing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "allergy_name" TEXT /* Name of the allergy */,
  "allergy_description" TEXT /* Description of the allergy */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Reaction to the allergy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES patients ("member_id")
)
